role: Configuration management and defaults for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Provides default configuration, environment variable parsing, configuration loading and validation, supported value access, and pre-commit setting resolution for ArchSpine.

children.role: Configuration factory module providing a default SpineConfig object for the ArchSpine system.
Infrastructure utility module providing environment variable parsing functions and constants for configuration governance.

Centralized configuration store for ArchSpine runtime settings, providing read/write access to persisted config data and LLM-specific configuration values, acting as a facade over lower-level infra modules.
Infrastructure configuration loader and facade for the ArchSpine system, responsible for reading configuration from disk, parsing JSON, validating, and merging with defaults.
Infra config utility for resolving the pre-commit boolean setting from an environment variable with an optional explicit parameter fallback.
Core TypeScript interface and utility functions defining the contract and operations for accessing and mutating supported configuration values in the ArchSpine system.
Type definition module centralizing configuration interfaces and enums for the ArchSpine mirror system.
Infrastructure validation facade for Spine configuration payloads.
